title: Nine Songs Three Signs
content:
The 
Nine Songs Three Signs
 are a phenomenon that accompanied the birth of the Ancient Ancestor and Celestial Ancestor, the Ancient ancestor got Nine Songs and the Celestial ancestor got the Three Signs.

These phenomena returned on the body of Wang Lin when fusing his powers as an Ancient and Celestial hybrid into a third, far stronger, power. When all Nine Songs appear, Wang Lin managed to summon the Ancient Ancestor's power.

Both the Nine Songs and Three Signs produce Silver Eyes

The full Nine Songs and Three Signs appeared when Wang Lin merged with his void avatar during his battle with Grand Empyrean 
Gu Dao
.

The Nine Songs
[
]

Signalled the birth of the Ancient Ancestor

Heavenly Wind Song

Heavenly Dao Thunder Beat

Origin Cloud Flute

Rain Song

Sky Song

Earth Song

Body Song

Internal Organs Song

Ancient Ancestor's Blood Song

The Three Signs
[
]

Signalled the birth of the Celestial Ancestor

Golden Sky, Black Earth

Silver Eyes

Newborn's Cry
